<lambda>Fr
cloudpickler
isinstancer
funcr
keywords
itemsr
inspectZ	CO_NESTED
WRAP_CACHE
getr 
Z	need_wrapZ	func_codeZ	func_nameZ
wrapped_objr
Wrapper for non-picklable object to use cloudpickle to serialize them.
    Note that this wrapper tends to slow down the serialization process as it
    is done with cloudpickle which is typically slower compared to pickle. The
    proper way to solve serialization issues is to avoid defining functions and
    objects in the main scripts and to implement __reduce__ functions for
    complex classes.
    z
could not from joblib.externals import cloudpickle. Please install cloudpickle to allow extended serialization. (`pip install cloudpickle`).c
z<wrap_non_picklable_objects.<locals>.CloudpickledClassWrapperc
zEwrap_non_picklable_objects.<locals>.CloudpickledClassWrapper.__init__N)
CloudpickledClassWrapperg
ImportErrorr3
isclassr
wrap_non_picklable_objectsV
	functoolsr
joblib.externals.cloudpickler
dictr4
objectr
<module>
